steps.title: Compare theory with result
steps.content: Text 1 presents the view that historical diversity strongly affects later community diversity. In Text 2, Mercer and colleagues expected that starting diversity would matter, but their pools ended with little to no difference in species diversity.

steps.title: State the likely assessment
steps.content: A says the theory is largely correct despite the failed prediction. B dismisses the theory regardless of data, and D says it probably applies in the study conditions, which the result does not show. The researchers would say the view may sound plausible but lacked support from their findings. The answer is C.
